title: exists with nulls gives incorrect result
description: Unexpected empty result with not exists and null on left side.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(50), nullable_col INT);
INSERT INTO test_table (value, nullable_col) VALUES ('test1', NULL), ('test2', 10), ('test3', NULL);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT NULL::INT AS id, 10 AS value) AS subquery WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_table WHERE test_table.id = subquery.id AND test_table.value = subquery.value);
CREATE TABLE another_table (num INT, description TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default');
key_bug_features: not exists with nulls on left side
